title: Bahrain women's national ice hockey team
summary:
The Bahraini women's national ice hockey team (Arabic: منتخب البحرين لهوكي الجليد للسيدات) is the women's national ice hockey team of Bahrain. In September 2024, Bahrain was added as a full member by the IIHF.


== References ==
text: The Bahraini women's national ice hockey team (Arabic: منتخب البحرين لهوكي الجليد للسيدات) is the women's national ice hockey team of Bahrain. In September 2024, Bahrain was added as a full member by the IIHF.
